.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Updated the Apache License URL from HTTP to HTTPS for security compliance.
Reordered import statements to follow standard Java conventions (java.io before java.net).
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Moved import java.io.*; before import java.net.*;

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Reformatted string concatenation for DEFAULT_DOWNLOAD_URL to improve readability.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Combined multi-line string concatenation into a single line assignment.

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Reformatted constant definitions for MAVEN_WRAPPER_PROPERTIES_PATH and MAVEN_WRAPPER_JAR_PATH to single lines.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Removed unnecessary line breaks in final String assignments.

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Added spaces after 'if' keywords to comply with standard Java coding style.
Adjusted indentation and line breaks for the Authenticator anonymous class definition.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Reformatted new Authenticator() block to align with surrounding code style.

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Removed trailing empty line at the end of the file.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Deleted empty line after closing brace of class.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation.Generated with jakarta.annotation.Generated to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes required for newer Spring Boot versions.
Update the version string in the generated annotation comment to reflect the current JHipster version.
Replace javax.annotation.PostConstruct with jakarta.annotation.PostConstruct to align with Jakarta EE namespace requirements in newer Spring Boot versions.
Convert multi-line string concatenation in log statement to Java 15+ text blocks for improved readability.
Add CRLFLogConverter marker to log statement to ensure safe logging of multi-line strings.
Update active profiles retrieval to fallback to default profiles if no active profiles are set, ensuring consistent logging output.
Replace escaped single quotes with literal single quotes in log message string to fix syntax or formatting.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed "'{}'" to "'{}'" (removing backslash escapes) in the error log string.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Insert JHipster generator needle comments into the configuration properties class to allow automated code generation hooks.
Restrict the AsyncConfiguration bean to non-test profiles to prevent conflicts with test-specific configurations.
Update @EnableJpaRepositories annotation to use explicit array syntax for the basePackages attribute.
Replace the legacy Hibernate5Module with Hibernate5JakartaModule to support Jakarta EE namespace changes required for Spring Boot 3 and Java 17 compatibility.
Remove Zalando Problem modules from Jackson configuration, likely due to dependency removal or migration to a different error handling strategy in the newer framework version.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed imports for ProblemModule and ConstraintViolationProblemModule and their corresponding @Bean methods.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated Spring Boot Liquibase setter with the new API method to maintain compatibility with updated Spring Boot version.
Replace deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter with a standalone SecurityFilterChain bean to comply with Spring Security 5.7+ requirements.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: public class SecurityConfiguration { @Bean public SecurityFilterChain filterChain(HttpSecurity http) ... }

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity with @EnableMethodSecurity to support the new method security model in Spring Security 5.7+.
Replace deprecated antMatchers with requestMatchers in the authorization configuration to align with the new HttpSecurity DSL.
Replace custom SecurityProblemSupport exception handlers with standard OAuth2 BearerTokenAuthenticationEntryPoint and BearerTokenAccessDeniedHandler.
Configure the application as an OAuth2 Resource Server with JWT support, replacing the custom JWT filter configuration.
Modernize HTTP header configuration by using the new lambda-based DSL for Content Security Policy, Frame Options, and Permissions Policy.
Replace the manual CorsFilter injection with a SpaWebFilter added after BasicAuthenticationFilter to handle SPA routing and CORS.
Update CSRF configuration to use the new lambda DSL and explicitly ignore H2 console requests before disabling CSRF.
Inject JHipsterProperties to dynamically configure security settings like Content Security Policy from application properties.
Update imports to remove deprecated Spring Security classes and add new ones required for the SecurityFilterChain and OAuth2 configuration.
Simplify static resource location configuration by removing the redundant 'app' subdirectory path.
Update resource path patterns to explicitly match file extensions and adjust path wildcards for better static resource resolution.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Replaced "/app/*", "/content/*", "/i18n/*" with explicit extension patterns like "/*.js", "/*.css" and adjusted wildcards.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
Use Java 16+ pattern matching for instanceof to simplify casting logic.
Remove try-catch for UnsupportedEncodingException which is no longer thrown by URLDecoder.decode(String, Charset) in modern Java.
Update CORS configuration to check for allowedOriginPatterns in addition to allowedOrigins, supporting newer Spring Security/Cors APIs.
Update CORS registration to use Swagger UI 3 endpoints instead of Swagger 2 endpoints.
Remove unused imports such as MediaType and UnsupportedEncodingException to clean up the code.
